text.title: Template Task Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Does the Objective describe ONE responsibility (no "and" linking two verbs)?
Are FR-X and AD-X traces present and resolvable in spec.md / design.md?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; render the task file and validate it.
split the task before rendering; do not emit a single >100k file.
defer until spec/design references resolve; do not emit task without traces.
split the Objective on the 'and' boundary; render two tasks instead.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → Objective is single-responsibility → FR-3 / AD-2 traces resolve in spec.md / design.md → est_tokens ~55k under cap → render the task file and validate.
